subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Us unto him who hath attained unto the days of God, the Mighty, the All-Praised. O Muhammad! Verily the Peerless One hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی من فاز بایام الله العزیز الحمید ان یا محمد قد ظهر الفرد
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
